inclusion_rationale: Retain as a broad amino-acid marker to test whether an amino-acid factor extends beyond BCAA/aromatic signals.

Retain as a lower-correlation amino-acid indicator that may improve breadth if it loads cleanly in EFA/ESEM.

Retain as a core BCAA marker; redundancy will be reviewed during compact reduction rather than excluded upfront.

Retain as an aromatic amino-acid marker and potential bridge between aromatic and broader amino-acid variation.

Retain as a low-redundancy TCA/central-carbon marker that may survive compact reduction if it contributes unique structure.
Retain as the canonical glycemic marker for the energy-metabolism block.
Retain as a glycolytic/anaerobic metabolism marker and candidate bridge to inflammation or ketone biology.
Retain as a ketone/fasting-related marker with distinctive negative correlation to lactate and GlycA.
